suggestedRules: When /evenemang 404s, try alternative Swedish event paths: /kalender, /program, /nyheter, /artikel, root path with nav scanning

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish newspaper sites with event calendars

suggestedRules: When homepage nav contains multiple high-scoring event paths (/events, /program, /kalender) but C1 shows no-main, this indicates homepage is a navigation hub - follow highest scoring path

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish municipality and city websites with event portals

suggestedRules: The /events, /kalender, /program paths are high-confidence candidates to try first

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish park, zoo, and cultural institutions with event listings
